title: digitalis × fucata
intro: Digitalis × fucata, also known as hybrid foxglove or digitalis, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Digitalis purpurea and Digitalis lanata. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to increase cardiac contractility and reduce heart rate, making it a useful treatment for heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Digitalis × fucata include its potential to improve cardiovascular function, reduce symptoms of heart failure, and increase patient survival rates. Digitalis × fucata is prepared as a herbal remedy through various methods, including tinctures, infusions, and extracts, which are often standardized to contain specific concentrations of the active compounds digoxin and digitoxin.
